signals.headline: Russia and Ukraine Agree to Easter Ceasefire** | YES | HIGH confidence[1]
signals.raw:
Russia and Ukraine Agree to Easter Ceasefire** | YES | HIGH confidence[1]

Russia announced a temporary ceasefire for Orthodox Easter, starting 4:00 p.m. Saturday April 11 and lasting until Sunday end, with Ukraine's Zelensky confirming reciprocation hours later[1]. This mutual agreement marks a confirmed short-term halt amid ongoing war, contrasting recent deadly Russian strikes reported today[3]
